programme.desc: In the dying embers of an 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship clash at Villa Park, Kemar Roofe's last-gasp goal sealed a famous Leeds comeback having trailed 2-0 to Aston Villa.

programme.title: EFL Cup 15/16:Liverpool v Man City
programme.desc: The first silverware of the season is claimed as Liverpool meet Manchester City at Wembley in the Capital One Cup final. Both have won this recently, Liverpool in 2012 and Man City in 2014.

programme.title: 1983 - When Aberdeen Ruled Europe
programme.desc: The story of the greatest year in the history of Aberdeen, when the yet to be knighted, Alex Ferguson, guided the club to two European trophies in the space of six months.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: C'Ship 23/24
programme.desc: Wembley Stadium sees the Sky Bet Championship play-off final between Leeds and Southampton. After their respective relegations, who will earn an immediate return to the top flight? (26.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 1 23/24
programme.desc: Wembley Stadium hosts the Sky Bet League One play-off final, as Bolton Wanderers face Oxford United. Who will emerge victorious and climb back into the second tier? (18.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 2 23/24
programme.desc: The Sky Bet League Two play-off final at Wembley sees Crawley - hot off an 8-1 aggregate win over MK Dons - face Crewe Alexandra, who overturned a 2-0 first-leg deficit to get here. (19.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

programme.title: EFL 18/19:Leeds Utd v Derby County
programme.desc: Frank Lampard's Derby go to Elland Road for the second leg of their 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final with Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds, with the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster
programme.desc: Two matches of Sky Bet League 1 semi-final play-off action couldn't separate Charlton Athletic and Doncaster Rovers in 2019, as a date at Wembley hinged on a dramatic penalty shootout.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
programme.desc: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

programme.title: Retro C'Ship SF 19: Leeds v Derby
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Championship play-offs. Here, a dramatic semi-final second leg from the 2018-19 season as Leeds and Derby went head-to-head at Elland Road.

programme.title: Retro C'Ship 12: B'pool v West Ham
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Championship. Here the play-off final from the 2011-12 campaign, as Blackpool and West Ham meet at Wembley.

programme.title: 150 Years of the Edinburgh Derby
programme.desc: To mark the 150th anniversary of one of the oldest rivalries in world football, look back at the origins, key moments with club legends and the tumultuous takeover bid in 1990.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
programme.desc: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

programme.title: EFL 97/98: Charlton v Sunderland
programme.desc: Relive a classic clash from the English Football League - here, rewind to May 1998 for the First Division play-off final at Wembley, as Charlton met Sunderland in an eight-goal thriller.

programme.title: Live International T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Ireland v India. Coverage of the second and final T20 in the series from Stormont Cricket Ground in Belfast. Coming into this series the visitors had won all eight of their matches in this format against Ireland, with the first game being played back in 2009. The last time they met before this set of matches was at the 2024 T20 World Cup, as India won a group match by eight wickets in New York.

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.sub-title: West Indies v Sri Lanka-1st Test, Day Four
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the two-match series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The hosts haven't won the first game in a series against Sri Lanka since an impressive 226-run win over them in a three-match contest back in June 2018. West Indies made scores of 414-8 declared and 223-7 declared in their two innings as they bowled their visitors out for 185 and 226 to claim a well-earned victory.
